data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding mode flags.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for mode flags (off, monitor, enforced) but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm or deny their existence or functionality. The prior step evidence does not include any specific details about the mode flags, leading to an inconclusive result. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to the mode flags means that the requirement cannot be validated at this time.
gaps: No evidence of mode flags (off, monitor, enforced) being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for mode flags
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of mode flags.
